ModMetaData.name: RSMF Restock Fix
ModMetaData.author: chezhou
ModMetaData.description:
RimSimManagementFramework restock reliability and goods-manager inventory filter.
- More reliable auto-restock (threshold, reservation, queue self-heal, silent wake) - Inventory filter and warehouse stock column in the goods manager - Optional Adaptive Storage Framework compatibility - Colony hauling mechs can participate in restock
Does not modify original RSMF files. Restock fix can be disabled in mod settings.
